description_long: This is a blocky, stylized doll with a cubic head and body, rendered in a pixel-art style reminiscent of voxel graphics. The doll is predominantly black, with striking red and white angular eye shapes on the face, giving it a masked superhero appearance similar to Spider-Man: Miles Morales. The chest features a red spider emblem, and the arms and legs are short and rectangular, matching the overall geometric aesthetic. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from plastic, with no visible joints or articulation. The doll is compact and solid, with no visible openings or interactive parts.
description: A blocky, black and red pixel-art doll with angular white and red eyes and a red spider emblem on the chest, resembling a superhero.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large white and red angular eyes and red spider emblem on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the doll's flat, featureless side and the protruding rectangular arm.
description_view_2: Rear view is not visible; only the background is shown.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and the blocky profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Superhero-inspired costume with a black base, red spider emblem on the chest, and angular white and red mask details, reminiscent of Spider-Man: Miles Morales.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms straight down at the sides and legs together, head facing forward, and body in a static, neutral position.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, angular white and red eyes; no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving a masked, emotionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; head is fully covered by a black mask.
